title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SEVENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY OF THE BALIUAG DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN BALIUAG, BULACAN TO ONE HUNDRED (100) TO ACCOMMODATE MORE PATIENTS WHO ARE SEEKING TREATMENT IN SAID HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 26192 / 88 OG No. 25, 3887 (JUne 22, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7446, April 27, 1992 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE SEVENTY-FIVE-BED CAPACITY OF THE BALIUAG DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN BALIUAG, BULACAN TO ONE HUNDRED (100) TO ACCOMMODATE MORE PATIENTS WHO ARE SEEKING TREATMENT IN SAID HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established an additional twenty-five-bed capacity of the Baliuag District Hospital in the town of Baliuag, Bulacan.

SEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged against the lump-sum appropriations authorized for the purpose under the current General Approproations Act. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 17, 1991 and February 3, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.)

ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.)

CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: APRIL 27, 1992

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
